description.value: Benefit: You now regenerate Action Points at a slow pace. You regenerate 1 Action Point once a week whenever you fall below your maximum (the amount of Action Points you gained from the most recent level). The maximum is 15 (regardless of how many you have above that from saving Action Points); if you spend one and one week passes by, you may add one more Action Point, up to your maximum. If you level within that week, you do not receive that Action Point back. Each level your pool readjusts to the new proper amount.
